name: patch-moi
description: Git-first patch-stack porcelain for forks on top of upstream projects.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, maintain, and inspect Git patch stacks with local tooling.
interface.longDescription: patch.moi helps operators inspect upstream remotes, inspect local patch branches, capture feature branches into patch branches, rebuild maintained branches, and pick up runner-produced candidate refs from Git. It also ships codex-flows automation templates as recipes. Runner execution, retry/replay, remote control, and thread transplant stay in codex-flows or the forge.
defaultPrompt: Capture this branch as a patch branch.
